# Transcrição: 17-Adaccount

- **Fonte:** 17-Adaccount
- **Duração:** 01:37
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 01:37]

Okay, so now we're going to look at how to access your ad account. So you're going to log into Facebook. And then all you do is you simply go up here and you're going to click Manage Ads. Now if you haven't created an ad before, just click on Create Ads and it's going to take you to your ad account. If this is the first time that you're accessing this, you'll be prompted to create the account. I was in the middle of a campaign, which is why, so just ignore this. So this is where it's going to take you. Now to add in your billing details, you're going to click this little hamburger sign here. You're going to scroll across and go to Billing and Payments. And then you're going to add your payment method. If you want to add someone to the account as an admin or an analyst or any of that stuff, go into your Ad Account Settings. And you can either copy and paste and send this number through to your agency or you can click on Add a Person. And you can select the role here, an analyst will only be able to look at the account and advertiser will be able to run and create ads. And then admin will be able to add credit card details. And you can enter the person's name right here. And that's how to access your ad account from Facebook, how to enter billing, and then how to add people to your account.
